form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months won by 10 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Mister Charmes carrying 56.5kg at $3.30. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at Saint-Cloud on September 12 over 1400m, slow going 9 len behind Dostoievsky with 58kg at $7.90. Has upside and worth following up.
